programs.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programs.desc: A couple who love the midcentury modern style thought buying a 1970s home made sense, but a pile of renovation projects has them calling for help; Dave and Jenny get to work, bringing their groovy pad and pool house back to its former glory.

programs.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programs.sub_title: First Home Gets a Modern Makeover
programs.desc: Dave and Jenny help a mother and son compromise on a renovation plan suitable for his first home, while also getting the most out of her investment.

programs.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programs.desc: Dave and Jenny race to create an accessible home renovation for an adult daughter with special needs who thrives best at home; with urgency high to renovate quickly, the Marrs also find time to celebrate 20 years of marriage by renewing their vows.

programs.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programs.desc: Dave and Jenny purchase an '80s rancher in an up-and-coming neighborhood to turn it into an amazing rental property; with their own money on the line, the Marrs are up against a tight budget and timeline as they push toward their open house.

programs.title: Renovation Aloha
programs.desc: After a friend brings a deal in exchange for a 50/50 partnership, the Kalamas take on a 4,000-square-foot A-frame overlooking Pearl Harbor. But when surprise design upgrades are added mid-reno, finances and friendships are put to the test.

programs.title: Renovation Aloha
programs.desc: When the Kalamas take on a roach-infested Manoa fixer, they think they've scored big, until demo reveals plumbing disasters, termite damage and a budget-busting surprise; to save the flip, they bet on a secondary suite and a smart backyard reset.
